what is ai: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the science of building systems that can perceive, reason, learn, and make decisions.
difference between bfs and dfs: BFS explores level-by-level and guarantees shortest path in unweighted graphs, while DFS explores depth-first and may find a path faster but not always the shortest.
what is an expert system: An expert system is a rule-driven AI that uses a knowledge base and inference engine to derive recommendations.
what is heuristic: A heuristic is a practical strategy or scoring method used to make good decisions quickly when exhaustive search is expensive.
what is knowledge representation: Knowledge representation is the way AI stores entities, relationships, and facts so reasoning algorithms can use them.
